message:
test(tui): add 35 unit tests for screen logic, density heuristics, and failure paths (br-1xt0m.1.13.8)

Dashboard: trend_for direction, anomaly_rail_height responsive, compute_percentile edge cases (8 tests)
Threads: sort mode/view lens cycling, apply_sort correctness for all 4 modes (8 tests)
Search: facet slot cycling round-trips and inverse, initial focus state (6 tests)
Timeline: verbosity tier cycling, severity inclusion, kind/source filter toggles, cursor saturation (8 tests)
System Health: severity priority ordering, width class boundaries, default enum values (5 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
